---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Target Area
Where in the project would this live?
- [ ] New page / route
- [ ] Existing page (which one?): ___
- [ ] Component (which one?): ___
- [ ] Design system / tokens (`index.css`, `tailwind.config.ts`)
- [ ] Content (project, case study, blog, skill, certificate)
- [ ] AI Chatbot / edge function
- [ ] 404 page / Space Shooter
- [ ] 3D background / Scene3D
- [ ] Build / tooling / deployment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## User Impact
Who benefits, and how? (Visitors, recruiters, clients, contributors, maintainers, etc.)

## Design / Mockups
Attach mockups, references, or links to similar implementations.

## Accessibility & Theme Considerations
- Works in both Dark and Light themes? [yes / no / N/A]
- Responsive on mobile, tablet, desktop? [yes / no / N/A]
- Keyboard / screen-reader accessible? [yes / no / N/A]

## Implementation Ideas (Optional)
If you have ideas on how this could be implemented (files to touch, libraries to use), share them.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the feature request.
